name: property managers handling 10-50 units tool
description: For property managers handling 10-50 units, inefficient tenant communication causes delayed work orders. We automate tenant communication instead of manual communication and tracking via email and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient tenant communication and delayed work order processing
